CONTENT.Honours: Club BruggeBelgian Super Cup: 2018Austria LustenauAustrian Football Second League: 2021–22
CONTENT.Club career: A member of the Club Brugge KV youth academy since 2011, Baiye made his professional debut with Brugge in a 5–2 Belgian First Division A win over Eupen on 29 July 2018.On 2 September 2019, he joined French club Clermont Foot on a three-year contract and was initially assigned to their B team.In January 2023, Baiye returned to Belgium to join Eupen on a two-and-a-half-year deal.
CONTENT.External links: Brandon Baiye at SoccerwayBrandon Baiye at the Royal Belgian Football Association
CONTENT.International career: Born in Belgium, Baiye is of Cameroonian descent. Baiye is a youth international for Belgium.

SUMMARY: Brandon Baiye (born 27 December 2000) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Belgian Pro League side Eupen.
